title: Work-related deductions
description: Deductions you can claim for expenses that directly relate to earning your employment income.
keywords: deductions, tax deductions, claiming deductions, work-related deductions, work-related

child_links.title: Cars, transport and travel
child_links.description: Deductions for car, transport and travel expenses you incur in the course of your work.

child_links.title: Tools, computers and items you use for work
child_links.description: Deductions for tools, computers, internet, stationery, books and other items you use for work.

child_links.title: Clothes and items you wear at work
child_links.description: Deductions for clothes, glasses, protective gear and other items you wear at work.

child_links.title: Working from home expenses
child_links.description: Deductions for expenses you incur as a result of working from home such as stationery, energy and office equipment.

child_links.title: Education, training and seminars
child_links.description: Deductions for self-education, conferences and training. You can't claim children's school fees or care.

child_links.title: Personal grooming, health and fitness
child_links.description: Deductions for medical assessments, vaccinations, COVID-19 tests, gym fees, cosmetics and personal grooming.
